title: How to tokenize text in NLTK?
description: I'm trying to tokenize text using NLTK but I'm not sure how to do it correctly.
accepted_answer:
You can tokenize text in NLTK using the word_tokenize function: ```python
import nltk
from nltk.tokenize import word_tokenize

text = 'Hello, how are you doing today?'
tokens = word_tokenize(text)
print(tokens)
```
